title: solanum aviculare var. laciniatum
intro: Solanum aviculare var. laciniatum, also known as the variable kohekohe, is a variety of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe wounds, and alleviate digestive issues. Solanum aviculare var. laciniatum can be prepared in various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
